goals.desired_outcome: A controlled founder use case demonstrates that an AI product can convert an incoming event and existing context into a traceable, decision-relevant state change.

verification_surfaces.description: A bounded user problem, observable before-and-after transition, evidence, explicit next action, and documented learning are all verified.

boundaries: The Build Week work is a bounded experiment serving this Goal, not a fourth Goal.
Exploration cannot substitute for one bounded validation test.
Files or submission artifacts alone do not complete the Goal.
goals.iteration_policy: Close one evidence-backed founder test before expanding scope.
goals.blocked_stop_condition: Stop when required evidence or human authority is unavailable.
uncertainty: The first production success metric and evidence threshold remain unverified.

goals.desired_outcome: Current income, delivery obligations, and operating capacity remain protected enough for deliberate product choices rather than purely reactive work.

verification_surfaces.description: Material commitments have bounded ownership, scope, acceptance conditions, timing or review cadence, and evidence of operating status.

boundaries: Private financial amounts, counterparties, accounts, and mechanisms remain outside the fixture.
Activity without bounded scope is not sufficient strategic alignment.
Documents or dashboards alone do not complete the Goal.
goals.iteration_policy: Prefer bounded repairs that preserve continuity and make authority explicit.
goals.blocked_stop_condition: Stop before unilateral movement when another authority holder is required.
uncertainty: Minimum continuity metrics and the complete private commitment inventory remain intentionally outside the fixture.

goals.desired_outcome: Non-displaceable personal or legal obligations remain protected so the founder can sustain lawful, stable participation in work and long-horizon plans.

verification_surfaces.description: Each protected obligation has verified requirements, authority, timing or review trigger, evidence, and an escalation path for missing information.

boundaries: Specific personal and legal matters remain outside the public fixture.
Unknown deadlines or authorities remain unknown.
A checklist, reminder, or file alone does not complete the Goal.
goals.iteration_policy: Protect continuity first and escalate missing authority or evidence for human review.
goals.blocked_stop_condition: Stop when a protected matter requires private evidence or qualified external authority.
uncertainty: Specific obligations, authorities, deadlines, and proof standards remain intentionally omitted.

controlled_demo_omissions.reason: The omitted Goal is unnecessary for the controlled transition and would add biography-level detail.
uncertainty: No private Goal content or lifecycle state is represented.
